planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with testesprite@gmail.com / testesprite123
Click on the 'Gestão Financeira e Contábil' module card (id: 6)
The Finance module page is displayed with a list of financial postings
Click the button to create a new financial posting
Fill in description, amount, and select type (receita/despesa)
The new posting appears in the financial list with the correct amount
